final_choice.row_label: Other ExpensesMaterial Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility

variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list appears to miss the firm's true direct service-cost rows. The income statement shows shipping-specific direct cost labels across years (e.g., Vessel Expenses, Fuel & Oil Expense, Voyage Expenses, Charter Expenses), suggesting COGS presentation changes over time. Chose the most clearly direct-cost label from the preview, but manual review is needed to build a robust cross-year COGS mapping. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Vessel Expenses

Explicit SG&A component.
